description_long: This is an adult female figure with a naturalistic body shape, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She is dressed in a two-piece bikini and open-toed sandals, revealing most of her skin. Her hair is long and styled in loose waves, falling past her shoulders and partially down her back. The figure's facial features are defined, and her limbs are proportionate, with visible fingers and toes. The surface of the figure appears smooth and slightly matte, with subtle shading to indicate anatomical details. The overall appearance is realistic, suitable for urban or outdoor environments where casual attire is appropriate.
description: A realistic adult female figure in a bikini and sandals, standing in a T-pose with long, wavy hair. The figure has smooth, naturalistic features and is designed for urban or outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, torso, and extended arms, with clear visibility of the bikini top and sandals.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the curve of the body, and the length of the hair down the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, bikini bottom, and the full length of the hair, with arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, body, and the way the hair falls along the back.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
